title: Mistral AI Chat Completion
description: Schema for a Mistral AI chat completion request and response, including message structures, tool definitions, and function calling.

ChatMessage.description: A message in a chat conversation with role and content.

role.description: The role of the message author.

content.description: The content of the message, either a string or an array of content parts for multimodal input.

tool_calls.description: Tool calls generated by the model in this message.

tool_call_id.description: The ID of the tool call this message responds to, required for tool role.

ContentPart.description: A content part for multimodal inputs such as text or images.

text.description: The text content, used when type is text.

image_url.description: The image URL object, used when type is image_url.

Tool.description: A tool that the model may call during completion.

type.description: The type of tool, currently only function is supported.

FunctionDefinition.description: Definition of a function that can be called by the model.

description.description: A description of what the function does.

parameters.description: The parameters accepted by the function, as a JSON Schema object.

ToolCall.description: A tool call generated by the model.

id.description: Unique identifier for the tool call.

name.description: The name of the function to call.

arguments.description: The arguments for the function call as a JSON string.

Usage.description: Token usage statistics for the API request.

prompt_tokens.description: Number of tokens in the prompt.

completion_tokens.description: Number of tokens in the completion.

total_tokens.description: Total tokens used in the request.

ChatCompletionChoice.description: A choice in the chat completion response.

finish_reason.description: The reason the model stopped generating.

id.description: Unique identifier for the chat completion.

created.description: Unix timestamp when the completion was created.

model.description: The model used for the completion.
